task: Parse an AWS CloudWatch log entry and extract the timestamp, log level, and message using a regular expression
solution_criteria: Regex pattern should correctly capture timestamp (ISO 8601 format), log level (ERROR, WARN, INFO, DEBUG), and the message content from a CloudWatch log line

task: Write a Python function that takes an AWS S3 bucket name and returns True if the name follows AWS naming conventions (lowercase, 3-63 characters, no consecutive hyphens)
solution_criteria: Function should validate S3 bucket naming rules and return a boolean; must handle edge cases like hyphens at start/end and length constraints

task: Create a JSON configuration object for an AWS Lambda function that specifies runtime, timeout, memory, environment variables, and VPC settings
solution_criteria: JSON should be valid, include required Lambda configuration fields (Runtime, Timeout, MemorySize, Environment, VpcConfig), and follow AWS CloudFormation or SAM format conventions
